overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking and running through a futuristic neon-lit city street at dusk. The character passes luxury storefronts including JINGUJI, navigates past pedestrians, and approaches a busy intersection with towering holographic advertisements and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with luxury storefronts and tactile paving

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the upper floors of the patterned building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the sidewalk, approaching and passing the JINGUJI store entrance while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing white shirt with black X symbol walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: luxury clothing store entrance with illuminated signage and Japanese text
tall building with distinctive wavy geometric pattern and uplighting
tall vertical advertising screens displaying colorful neon content
tall palm trees lining the center of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at dusk, with the camera following a character walking past the illuminated JINGUJI luxury store. The right side is dominated by a tall building with a distinctive wavy patterned facade, while neon billboards glow on the left. The camera briefly tilts upward to admire the architecture before continuing forward through sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional street section with increasing pedestrian activity

events.description: character transitions from walking to running pace
camera pans left to observe traffic on the wet street

agents.ego_description: running past pedestrians on the sidewalk and weaving through the crowd while the camera briefly observes passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright green pants and gray jacket walking toward the camera
futuristic black sedan driving down the wet street with neon underglow

segments.scene_description: The character picks up speed to a run, passing several pedestrians including one in distinctive bright green pants. The camera pans left to capture futuristic vehicles driving on the wet asphalt before returning to forward facing. The JINGUJI store falls behind as the patterned building facade recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection with circular advertising structure

events.description: approaching large intersection with prominent circular rotating billboard structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection following a pedestrian with red hair, observing the expanding urban landscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and bright blue pants walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: commercial storefront with green neon signage and circular window displays
large cylindrical rotating billboard structure at the intersection center
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The street opens up as the character approaches a major intersection, passing the ALABANON store with its green neon signage. A distinctive circular advertising structure dominates the view ahead, surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive holographic displays. The character follows a pedestrian with red hair toward the bustling crossroads where elevated walkways span above the traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit city street that evolves from a focused walk past luxury storefronts into a wide-angle approach toward a bustling urban intersection. It begins by trailing a character past the illuminated JINGUJI store, where the camera briefly tilts upward to capture a tall building with a wavy patterned facade. As the character picks up speed to a run, the camera pans left to glimpse futuristic vehicles on wet asphalt before the patterned architecture recedes into the distance. The scene then opens up as the character passes the green neon signage of the ALABANON store, shifting the focus toward a massive circular advertising structure. Finally, the camera follows a red-haired pedestrian toward a sprawling crossroads dominated by towering skyscrapers, holographic displays, and elevated walkways spanning the traffic.
